examples: Greek researchers from the University of Athens Medical School, Athens, Greece, tried to figure out why people on the Greek island of Ikaria live a lot longer than we do.

The most comprehensive work on Ikaria has been done by the University of Athens, whose researchers studied islanders aged over 65.
The Pentagon is funding both Roth and Ikaria in hopes of devising a drug that would keep hemorrhaging soldiers alive long enough to be flown to a hospital.
